title: Flea Treatment in Kensington, Brooklyn | $350 – $650 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Kensington, Brooklyn. Effective flea extermination for homes and apartments. Licensed exterminators. Call today for $350 – $650 service!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Kensington home? Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, effective flea treatment services throughout this historic Brooklyn neighborhood. Our licensed exterminators use proven methods to eliminate fleas from your apartment or house, protecting your family and pets from these persistent pests.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Kensington residents for years with customized flea treatment solutions that work for both pre-war brownstones and modern apartment buildings. Our technicians understand the unique pest challenges of Brooklyn neighborhoods and deliver guaranteed results with safe, pet-friendly treatment options.
localContext: Kensington's tree-lined streets, proximity to Prospect Park, and mix of single-family homes and multi-unit buildings create ideal conditions for flea infestations, especially in pet-friendly households. From the Victorian homes near the Parade Grounds to apartments along Church Avenue and Coney Island Avenue, our team provides comprehensive flea control throughout the entire neighborhood.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Kensington, Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Our flea treatment services in Kensington range from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most customers see significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours after treatment. Complete elimination typically takes 2-3 weeks as we target fleas at all life stages. We often recommend a follow-up treatment after 14 days to ensure all newly hatched fleas are eliminated.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for homes with children and pets when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours until surfaces dry completely. Our technicians will provide specific safety instructions based on the products used.

faqs.question: Do I need to prepare my Kensington home before flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, preparation is essential for effective treatment. We ask that you thoroughly vacuum all carpets and floors, wash pet bedding in hot water, and remove pets during treatment. Our team will provide a detailed preparation checklist when you schedule your appointment to ensure maximum effectiveness.
